item.title: 📝 curl/curl (42330 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: curl

📝 Repository: curl/curl

📄 Descrizione: A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

⭐ Stelle: 42330

🍴 Forks: 7266

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: c client curl ftp gopher hacktoberfest http https imaps ldap libcurl library mqtt pop3 scp sftp transfer-data transferring-data user-agent websocket

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2010-03-18T22:32:22Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-08T03:59:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp (28140 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DeusData

📝 Repository: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp

📄 Descrizione: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 28140

🍴 Forks: 2095

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: aider ast claude-code code-analysis code-intelligence codex cursor cypher developer-tools gemini-cli graph-visualization kilocode knowledge-graph mcp mcp-server model-context-protocol opencode sqlite tree-sitter windsurf

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-24T22:01:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-08T05:14:06Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
